tluaDottedFunctionDeclarations.tlua(14,19): error TLUA2345: Argument of type 'string' is not assignable to parameter of type 'number'.
tluaDottedFunctionDeclarations.tlua(15,19): error TLUA2339: Property 'nonexistent' does not exist on type '{ identity(a: number): number; add(a: number, b: number): number; }'.


==== tluaDottedFunctionDeclarations.tlua (2 errors) ====
    local M = {};
    
    function M.identity(a: number): number
      return a;
    end
    
    function M.add(a: number, b: number): number
      return M.identity(a) + b;
    end
    
    local early = M.add(1, 2);
    local late = M.identity(3);
    
    local bad = M.add("nope", 2);
                      ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2345: Argument of type 'string' is not assignable to parameter of type 'number'.
    local missing = M.nonexistent(1);
                      ~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'nonexistent' does not exist on type '{ identity(a: number): number; add(a: number, b: number): number; }'.
